name: face-to-many
description: Turn a face into 3D, emoji, pixel art, video game, claymation or toy

control_depth_strength.description: Strength of depth controlnet. The bigger this is, the more controlnet affects the output.
control_depth_strength.title: Control Depth Strength

custom_lora_url.description: URL to a Replicate custom LoRA. Must be in the format https://replicate.delivery/pbxt/[id]/trained_model.tar or https://pbxt.replicate.delivery/[id]/trained_model.tar
custom_lora_url.title: Custom Lora Url

denoising_strength.description: How much of the original image to keep. 1 is the complete destruction of the original image, 0 is the original image
denoising_strength.title: Denoising Strength

image.description: An image of a person to be converted
image.title: Image

instant_id_strength.description: How strong the InstantID will be.
instant_id_strength.title: Instant Id Strength

lora_scale.description: How strong the LoRA will be
lora_scale.title: Lora Scale

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want in the image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt_strength.description: Strength of the prompt. This is the CFG scale, higher numbers lead to stronger prompt, lower numbers will keep more of a likeness to the original.
prompt_strength.title: Prompt Strength

seed.description: Fix the random seed for reproducibility
seed.title: Seed
